languages.text: "Мой коллега Нунциус весьма заинтересовен в том, чтобы обсудить с почтенными коллегами из числа Магос Биологис достигнутые ими результаты... И я горячо поддерживаю его инициативу". {n}Манипулус пытливо всматривается в Вистенцу.{/n} "Ведь метагеномное изыскание проводится под эгидой Культа Механикус, верно?"

"My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"
languages.original_text: "Мой коллега Нунциус весьма заинтересовен в том, чтобы обсудить с почтенными коллегами из числа Магос Биологис достигнутые ими результаты... И я горячо поддерживаю его инициативу". {n}Манипулус пытливо всматривается в Вистенцу.{/n} "Ведь метагеномное изыскание проводится под эгидой Культа Механикус, верно?"

traits.locale_text: "My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

"My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the acquired results with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the eugenic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

"My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the eugenic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

"My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the eugenic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

"My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

languages.text: «Mi colega Nuncius está muy interesado en debatir los resultados obtenidos con nuestros estimados colegas del Magos Biologis... y yo apoyo fervientemente su iniciativa». {n}El manipulus mira intensamente a Vistenza.{/n} «Después de todo, esta investigación metagenómica se lleva a cabo bajo los auspicios del Culto Mechanicus, ¿no es así?».
languages.original_text: "My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: «Mi colega Nuncius está muy interesado en debatir los resultados obtenidos con nuestros estimados colegas del Magos Biologis... y yo apoyo fervientemente su iniciativa». {n}El manipulus mira intensamente a Vistenza.{/n} «Después de todo, esta investigación metagenómica se lleva a cabo bajo los auspicios del Culto Mechanicus, ¿no es así?».

languages.text: “我的同僚努恩修斯热切希望与生物贤者中备受尊敬的同僚们探讨所取得的成果……而我也很支持他的提议。”{n}操纵者专注地看着维丝坦萨。{/n}“毕竟，这项宏基因组学研究是在机械修会的赞助下进行的，不是吗？”
languages.original_text: "My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: “我的同僚努恩修斯热切希望与生物贤者中备受尊敬的同僚们探讨所取得的成果……而我也很支持他的提议。”{n}操纵者专注地看着维丝坦萨。{/n}“毕竟，这项宏基因组学研究是在机械修会的赞助下进行的，不是吗？”

languages.text: "Mein Kollege Nuncius würde sich gerne über die Ergebnisse unserer geschätzten Kollegen in den Reihen des Magos Biologis unterhalten ... Und ich unterstütze seine Initiative ausdrücklich." {n}Der Manipulus mustert Vistenza.{/n} "Immerhin erfolgt die metagenomische Forschung unter der Aufsicht des Kult Mechanicus, oder nicht?
languages.original_text: "My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: "Mein Kollege Nuncius würde sich gerne über die Ergebnisse unserer geschätzten Kollegen in den Reihen des Magos Biologis unterhalten ... Und ich unterstütze seine Initiative ausdrücklich." {n}Der Manipulus mustert Vistenza.{/n} "Immerhin erfolgt die metagenomische Forschung unter der Aufsicht des Kult Mechanicus, oder nicht?

languages.text: « Mon collègue Nuncius serait curieux de discuter des résultats obtenus avec nos estimés confrères du Magos Biologis... Et je soutiens pleinement son initiative. » {n}Le manipulus dévisage Vistenza.{/n} « Après tout, les recherches métagénomiques sont menées sous l'égide du Culte Mechanicus, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: "My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: « Mon collègue Nuncius serait curieux de discuter des résultats obtenus avec nos estimés confrères du Magos Biologis... Et je soutiens pleinement son initiative. » {n}Le manipulus dévisage Vistenza.{/n} « Après tout, les recherches métagénomiques sont menées sous l'égide du Culte Mechanicus, n'est-ce pas ? »

languages.text: "Meslektaşım Nuncius, elde edilen sonuçları saygıdeğer Magos Biyologis meslektaşlarımızla tartışmakla yakından ilgili... Ben de onun bu girişimini hararetle destekliyorum." {n}Manipülus, dikkatle Vistenza'ya bakıyor.{/n} "Sonuçta metagenomik araştırmalar, Cult Mechanicus'un himayesi altında yürütülüyor. Öyle değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: "Meslektaşım Nuncius, elde edilen sonuçları saygıdeğer Magos Biyologis meslektaşlarımızla tartışmakla yakından ilgili... Ben de onun bu girişimini hararetle destekliyorum." {n}Manipülus, dikkatle Vistenza'ya bakıyor.{/n} "Sonuçta metagenomik araştırmalar, Cult Mechanicus'un himayesi altında yürütülüyor. Öyle değil mi?"

languages.text: 「同僚のヌンシウスは、我々尊敬するマゴス・ビオロギスの仲間たちと得られた結果について議論することに熱心です…そして私は彼の意欲を強く支持しています。」{n}マニピュラスはヴィステンザを見つめながら言った。{/n}「結局のところ、優生学の研究は、機械神教の庇護の下で行われているのですよね？」
languages.original_text: "My colleague Nuncius is keenly interested in discussing the results obtained with our esteemed colleagues among the Magos Biologis... And I fervently support his initiative." {n}The Manipulus looks intently at Vistenza.{/n} "After all, the metagenomic research is being conducted under the auspices of the Cult Mechanicus, is it not?"

traits.locale_text: 「同僚のヌンシウスは、我々尊敬するマゴス・ビオロギスの仲間たちと得られた結果について議論することに熱心です…そして私は彼の意欲を強く支持しています。」{n}マニピュラスはヴィステンザを見つめながら言った。{/n}「結局のところ、優生学の研究は、機械神教の庇護の下で行われているのですよね？」
